title: BRANDLE OS — PART II IMPLEMENTATION PACK

sections.title: brandL Module
sections.summary: Identity consolidation: targets, domain/handle signals, consistency scoring, fallback families, acquisition plan, outreach templates.

sections.title: 4IELD Module
sections.summary: Competitive field intelligence: competitor intake, clustering, saturation/crowding heuristics, risk zones, drift baseline, conceptual field map.

sections.title: Exports
sections.summary: Field Report section appended to decision pack; separate field export when enabled.

sections.title: V4ULT Logging
sections.summary: brandL + 4IELD runs logged as archive events with receipts.

summary: Implements Part 2 scope for BRANDLE OS: brandL (identity consolidation across domains/handles) and 4IELD (heuristic competitive field intelligence + conceptual field map), preserving Part 1 dRANb.
